## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy server.py` passes
- [ ] `shellcheck tests/test.sh` passes
- [ ] `hadolint Dockerfile` passes
- [ ] `./tests/test.sh` passes
- [ ] No new external dependencies added
- [ ] Docker image builds and is under 100 MB
- [ ] I have updated the README (if behavior changed)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests (if applicable)
